# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  vmName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myVM
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    defaultValue: azureuser
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Please provide a password for the VM administrator account.
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: [resourceGroup().location]
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
    name: myPublicIp
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: [parameters('vmName')]
    location: [parameters('location')]
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses", "myPublicIp")]'
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
          offer: WindowsServer
          sku: 2019-Datacenter
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'myNic')]
      osProfile:
        computerName: [parameters('vmName')]
        adminUsername: [parameters('adminUsername')]
        adminPassword: [parameters('adminPassword')]

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: '2020-11-01'
    name: myNic
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'myPublicIp')]

outputs:
  publicIpAddress:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(resourceId("Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses", "myPublicIp")).ipAddress]'
